posting.sponsorName: Joint Apprenticeship and Training Committee (JATC) for Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers, Local Union #2 (Utica)
posting.applicationSummary: Obtain and complete the application in person at the Liverpool office or online 24 hours a day, then return it by mail if needed. Applications must be received by April 30, 2027.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers, Local Union #2 (Utica), 7705 Maltlage Drive, Liverpool, NY 13090
posting.applicationMailingAddress: Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers JATC #2 (Utica), 7705 Maltlage Drive, Liverpool, NY 13090
posting.applicationHours: Mondays through Fridays each month, from 8:00 p.m. to 4:00 p.m., excluding legal holidays, during the recruitment period.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 17 years old.
posting.residencyRequirement: Must have lived within the geographic jurisdiction of Local Union #2 for at least 6 months before applying. Counties include Albany, Cayuga, Clinton, Columbia, Essex, Franklin, Fulton, Greene, Hamilton, Herkimer, Jefferson, Lewis, Madison, Montgomery, Oneida, Onondaga, Oswego, Rensselaer, St. Lawrence, Saratoga, Schenectady, Schoharie, Warren, and Washington.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have reliable transportation to and from job sites and required classes, and must have a valid driver’s license to operate company vehicles.
posting.classRequirement: Must be able to attend required classes at the approved school.
allRequirements: Must be at least 17 years old.
Must be physically able to lift 50-100 pounds.
Must have reliable transportation to and from job sites and required classes at the approved school.
Must have a valid driver’s license to operate company vehicles.

Must reside within the geographic jurisdiction of Local Union #2 for at least 6 months prior to application. This includes the counties of Albany, Cayuga, Clinton, Columbia, Essex, Franklin, Fulton, Greene, Hamilton, Herkimer, Jefferson, Lewis, Madison, Montgomery, Oneida, Onondaga, Oswego, Rensselaer, St. Lawrence, Saratoga, Schenectady, Schoharie, Warren, and Washington.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be at least 17, able to lift 50-100 pounds, have reliable transportation and a valid driver’s license, and meet the Local Union #2 residency rule.
posting.contactName: JATC for Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers, Local Union #2 (Utica)
posting.contactSummary: Contact the JATC for Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers, Local Union #2 (Utica) at (315) 622-2081 for more information.
